agentSpans.name: invoke_agent Strands Agents
agentSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use the get_weather tool exactly once to get the weather in Tokyo.
agentSpans.output: The weather in Tokyo is currently sunny with a temperature of 72 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: agentcore-multiple-tools-weather
input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use the get_weather tool exactly once to get the weather in Tokyo.
output: The weather in Tokyo is currently sunny with a temperature of 72 degrees Fahrenheit.
